name: Kobold Scout
description: A wary kobold scout with better equipment. Watches for intruders in the mine tunnels.

attacks.name: Short Sword
attacks.description: A quick slash with a short blade

attacks.name: Sling
attacks.description: A stone hurled from a leather sling

special_abilities.name: Pack Tactics
special_abilities.description: Gains +1 to attack rolls when adjacent to an ally

special_abilities.name: Evasive
special_abilities.description: Higher dexterity makes them harder to hit

behavior.notes: Will flee when HP drops to 3 or below. Prefer sling attacks from distance.
